imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Stylized illustrated portrait of Adam Smith in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-adam-smith.dim_400x500.png)
- Stylized illustrated portrait of John Maynard Keynes in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-keynes.dim_400x500.png)
- Stylized illustrated portrait of Milton Friedman in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-friedman.dim_400x500.png)
- Stylized illustrated portrait of Karl Marx in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-marx.dim_400x500.png)
- Stylized illustrated portrait of Friedrich Hayek in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-hayek.dim_400x500.png)
- Stylized illustrated portrait of Joseph Schumpeter in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-schumpeter.dim_400x500.png)

existing_features.title: Add a Tinder-style profile card header to each economist's StatementSlide and EconomistRevealCard. Each card header should display the economist's name in large bold typography, a stylized avatar/portrait placeholder with a gradient backdrop, age or era label (e.g. '1883–1946'), and location/school of thought tag — all styled in the classic Tinder card layout (full-bleed image area at top, overlaid name/info at bottom-left in white text on a dark gradient).
